AI4
Tool CardNew
Agent InputNew
Chat BubbleNew
Streaming TextNew
AI

AI

Production-ready UI primitives for chat interfaces, streaming responses, and AI agent workflows.

New

Agent Input

New

Auto-resizing chat input with send / stop states, suggestion chips, and staged file attachments — wires directly into any AI SDK.

Chat Bubble

New

Animated user and assistant message bubbles with a spring entry, typing indicator, and a composable MessageList for full conversation threads.

Streaming Text

New

Character-by-character text reveal that tracks append-only target strings — simulates live token streaming. Includes a blinking cursor and a word-level TokenStream variant.

Tool Card

New

Collapsible card for AI tool invocations — shows the tool name, status (running / done / error) with spring-animated icon transitions, and an expandable input / output body.

All AI
